pi_items.source: Task definition specifies this as the policy to be created in Eramba GRC

Keywords verified against ISO 27001:2022 Control 7.7 (A.11.2.9 in 2013 version) which explicitly states sensitive documents must be locked away in secure cabinets, safes, or drawers. See: https://www.isms.online/iso-27002/control-7-7-clear-desk-and-clear-screen/
Task definition specifies this synthetic compliance package name for the Eramba exercise

Verified as real ISO 27001:2013 Annex A control code. In ISO 27001:2022, this is numbered as control 7.7. See: https://www.isms.online/iso-27001/annex-a-2013/annex-a-11-physical-and-environmental-security-2013/

pi_items.metadata_value: Clear Desk and Clear Screen Policy
pi_items.verified_value: Clear desk and clear screen policy
pi_items.source: Verified as the official title of ISO 27001 A.11.2.9 (ISO 27001:2013) / Control 7.7 (ISO 27001:2022). See: https://www.isms.online/iso-27002/control-7-7-clear-desk-and-clear-screen/

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating synthetic compliance data in Eramba GRC software. The metadata claims reference ISO 27001:2013 control A.11.2.9 (Clear desk and clear screen policy), which is a verified real standard control. The policy name 'Clean Desk and Screen Policy' is the synthetic task artifact to be created, with description keywords 'sensitive documents' and 'locked away' that accurately reflect ISO 27001:2022 Control 7.7 requirements. The compliance package 'ISO 27001 Audit Prep' is a synthetic construct for the exercise. Item code A.11.2.9 is verified as a real ISO 27001:2013 control code.
